title: Choosing an Elective
prose: The list on the board is the same one every third-year agonizes over: Divination, Care of Magical Creatures, Arithmancy, Muggle Studies, Ancient Runes — pick wrong and you're stuck with it for years.

choices.label: Divination — Professor Trelawney's tower is odd, but the subject's oddly compelling.
Care of Magical Creatures — Hagrid's classes are never, ever boring.
Arithmancy — numbers that actually predict something, for once.
Muggle Studies — you've got questions, and Professor Burbage has answers.
Ancient Runes — a language older than the castle itself.
